_credit.license: PixelLab Terms of Service — output may be used commercially in user projects. May NOT be used to train models.
_credit.prompt: small chubby brown teddy bear cub, IMPORTANT: NOT a dog, NOT slim, NOT thin, ROUND PLUMP cube-like body shape, very wide rounded barrel body, very short stubby legs barely visible, two small round ears on top of head (NOT pointed, NOT triangle), small round muzzle with tiny black nose, small black dot eyes, no neck, head sits directly on body, classic Care Bears or Winnie the Pooh chibi style, single black outline, simple flat colors, 3-color palette, minimalist 16-bit RPG NPC, sitting calmly facing right

_notes.paletteScheme: Quantised to PetPalettes index 5 (Caramel). Slots: 1=outline 2=primary 3=secondary 4=highlight 5=accent 6=pattern. Swap the palette block at render time to recolour.
_notes.mirrored: All frames mirrored horizontally during import (East-facing baseline; PixelLab west.png faces left).
_notes.groundOffsetsY: Per-stage feet-row index from the top of the 48-row canvas — used by PetStage to bottom-anchor sprites so all displayScales sit on the ground line correctly.
